summary: 23 passed, 1 failed across 24 tests (smoke + design + responsive). One confirmed application bug: mobile nav overflow at 375px. All design compliance checks pass.

errors.error: Horizontal overflow detected at 375px width. The sticky header nav (logo + 3 nav links + Connect Wallet button) has no responsive collapse — all items stay inline in a single flex row at 375px, pushing total scroll width beyond viewport.
errors.root_cause: Layout.tsx header: nav items and WalletButton are in a single flex row with no @media breakpoint to collapse or hide nav links. At 375px the combined width (logo ~120px + nav ~200px + wallet button ~160px + gaps) exceeds 375px.
errors.fix: Add a hamburger menu or hide non-critical nav items below ~600px breakpoint. The WalletButton and nav links need to reflow at mobile widths.

bugs_found.description: Header nav overflows at 375px viewport width. No responsive breakpoints exist in the header layout. The flex row containing logo + nav links + wallet button has no wrapping or hamburger menu, causing horizontal scroll.
bugs_found.reproduction: Set viewport to 375px width and navigate to any page. document.documentElement.scrollWidth > document.documentElement.clientWidth returns true.
bugs_found.tablet_status: PASS — 768px has sufficient width to display all nav items without overflow.

design_compliance.dark_background: PASS — body background is rgb(10, 10, 26) (--bg-deep), luminance 0.016
design_compliance.no_emojis: PASS — all 5 routes checked, zero emoji characters found
design_compliance.skeleton_loaders: PASS — .skeleton CSS class is defined with shimmer animation
design_compliance.reduced_motion: PASS — @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule present in globals.css disabling all animations
design_compliance.monospace_font: PASS — body uses Space Mono, ui-monospace, monospace (not Inter/Roboto/Arial)
design_compliance.tabular_nums: PASS — font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums applied to .input-field, .stat-badge, .code-text, and inline numeric elements
design_compliance.background_atmosphere: PASS — body::before and body::after pseudo-elements provide grid pattern and top accent bar
design_compliance.no_white_cards: PASS — no card elements have rgb(255, 255, 255) background
design_compliance.css_custom_properties: PASS — 0 hardcoded hex colors found outside :root (threshold: <15)
design_compliance.explorer_links: PASS — mempool.opnet.org and opscan.org URLs present in constants.ts; ExplorerLinks component imports mempoolTxUrl and opscanAddressUrl

routes_tested.name: home
routes_tested.notes: MintPage renders correctly. Skeleton loader shows for totalMinted while RPC call is in flight. No console errors.

routes_tested.name: mint
routes_tested.notes: Route resolves to MintPage (same as /). No errors.

routes_tested.name: gallery
routes_tested.notes: Empty state renders correctly ('No BlockMaps minted yet. Be the first.'). Glass-card search box visible.

routes_tested.name: my-blocks
routes_tested.notes: Note: actual route is /my not /my-blocks per App.tsx. Page renders without errors.

routes_tested.name: block-detail
routes_tested.notes: Skeleton shown briefly then error state renders: 'Block #800000 has not been minted.' Expected — no blocks minted on testnet yet. No console errors.

notes: The /mint route is not a separate route in App.tsx — it resolves to the same MintPage as /. This matches the observed behavior.
The /my-blocks path used in the task description is actually /my in App.tsx. Test was adjusted accordingly.

Explorer links (mempool.opnet.org, opscan.org) are wired in the codebase but only rendered in the DOM after a successful mint transaction. The smoke test verifies they exist in the source modules, not the live DOM.
The CSS has 0 hardcoded hex colors outside :root based on stylesheet inspection.
Vite dev server at http://localhost:5177 was already running and was reused (no webServer config needed).
